audit_notes: Audited 5 leaves: (1) section '14-01 LANとWAN' clean. (2) figure caption 'LANは廊下、WANは道路' rendered literally as corridor/road metaphor in zh & en — faithful, mnemonic preserved. (3) term 'ネットワーク' definition — components list (computers/lines/routers/software) accurately conveyed. (4) term 'LAN' definition — '社内や学校内といった、狭い範囲' rendered as '公司内、校园内等狭小范围' / 'inside a company or a school' — accurate. (5) term 'WAN' definition — '大規模な（広範囲の）ネットワーク' → '大规模（广范围）的网络' / 'A large-scale (wide-area) network' — faithful, minor: zh '广范围' is slightly literal but acceptable. Acronym expansions Local Area Network / Wide Area Network preserved. No choice markers.
